title: Expand into AI-Driven Customer Experience Solutions
evidence: The new economic model for partners with Autonomous CX allows building industry solutions that can be reused, scaled.

title: Leverage SAP's Cloud Services to Tap into Rapid Market Growth
evidence: Cloud revenue grew by up 19% and the total cloud backlog increased by 20%. These figures indicate strong market demand for rapid deployment of new services.

title: Form Strategic Partnerships with Cloud Service Providers to Enhance Digital Transformation
evidence: SAP announced partnerships, enabling interaction models like conversational commerce and AI-driven search. This signifies a move towards integrated cloud services.

title: Develop Composable Commerce Solutions for Mid-Market Expansion
evidence: SAP continues innovation in composable commerce, indicating an opportunity area due to its expansion and new offerings built around AI assistants.
